task_completion.description: Access the SEB Server web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and displaying the SEB Server interface at http://localhost:8080.
A text input field for the configuration name contains exactly 'Engineering Basics - DEBUG'.
A field labeled 'Quit Password' (or similar) contains the text 'logcheck!23'. If the field masks input, look for screenshots captured during typing or where the password is shown in plain text.
A checkbox, toggle, or radio button labeled 'Show Quit Button' is in the enabled, checked, or 'true' state.

task_completion.description: Set the Log Level to Debug
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown menu or selection field labeled 'Log Level' (or similar logging configuration) is set to 'Debug'.

task_completion.description: Save and verify the creation of the exam configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The newly created 'Engineering Basics - DEBUG' configuration appears in the main list or table of saved exam configurations on the SEB Server dashboard.

integrity.description: Agent used the SEB Server web GUI to create the configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the SEB Server web interface in a browser, rather than using a terminal to send curl/API requests or modifying database files directly.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual localhost:8080 application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows 'localhost:8080' (or 127.0.0.1:8080) and the SEB Server UI is fully rendered, not a local HTML file or a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration list
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) pane is not open, and the configuration list appears naturally formatted without signs of manual DOM manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected exam configuration name is exactly 'Engineering Basics - DEBUG'. The Quit Password must be set to 'logcheck!23'. The 'Show Quit Button' setting must be enabled (true). The Log Level must be set to 'Debug'.
